description_long: This is a pair of modern sunglasses featuring a sleek, semi-rimless design with dark, oval lenses and a thin, minimalist frame. The frame is constructed with a prominent browline that extends across the top of the lenses, while the lower half of the lenses is left exposed, giving a lightweight and contemporary appearance. The temples are slender and gently curved, designed to fit comfortably over the ears, and are attached to the frame with small, visible hinges. The bridge is narrow and subtly arched, connecting the two lenses seamlessly. The lenses are deeply tinted, providing substantial protection from sunlight and adding to the stylish, urban aesthetic. No visible embellishments or logos are present, emphasizing a clean and understated look.
description: A sleek, semi-rimless pair of sunglasses with dark oval lenses and a thin, minimalist frame. The design is modern and understated, with no visible logos or embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark, oval lenses and the prominent browline frame with a semi-rimless lower edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, gently curved temple and the small hinge connecting it to the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the open, semi-rimless lower lens edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and hinge, mirroring the design seen in view 1.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a semi-rimless, browline style with a thin, minimalist upper rim and exposed lower lens edges. The temples are slender and gently curved, with a smooth, streamlined profile and no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are deeply tinted in a dark gray or black shade, providing high opacity and a uniform color without gradient or mirrored effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a narrow, subtly arched piece that connects the lenses directly, forming a continuous line with the browline and lacking separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a smooth finish and no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
